top_signals.title: Warsh promises inflation will be a 'thing of the past,' cites benefits of AI investment boom
top_signals.summary: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dangote Ends Naira Pricing for Refined Oil Products in Nigeria
top_signals.summary: Dangote Refinery is halting the sale of petroleum products in naira within the Nigerian market, Punch Newspaper reported, citing failings in a landmark 2024 plan for the state-owned energy company to supply crude in local currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Software Stocks Sink as IBM Miss Delivers ‘Devastating Blow’
top_signals.summary: Shares of software and IT services companies plunged Tuesday after International Business Machines Corp. reported preliminary results that missed analyst expectations, reigniting questions over the sector’s prospects.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Americans expect prolonged US-Iran war as ceasefire falters, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Americans expect prolonged US-Iran war as ceasefire falters, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump sends Congress formal notice that Iran conflict has resumed - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump sends Congress formal notice that Iran conflict has resumed  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reforming the customs treatment of low value imports into the United Kingdom
top_signals.summary: This consultation announces the removal of the £135 customs duty relief for low-value imports and seeks views on certain elements of a new set of customs arrangements for these goods.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Consultation on the Introduction of Electric Vehicle Excise Duty (eVED)
top_signals.summary: A consultation setting out further detail on how eVED will work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Consultation on Reforming Land Remediation Relief
top_signals.summary: The government is consultation on potential reforms to make Land Remediation Relief more accessible, better targeted, and more closely aligned with the practical realities of brownfield development.

top_signals.title: Industry partners form North American Critical Manganese Alliance
top_signals.summary: Aim is develop two complementary industrial platforms; Canadian and US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
